records.question: Which subjects named Language include courses whose name and description are exactly Spanish?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT subjects.subject_id FROM subjects
JOIN courses ON subjects.subject_id = courses.subject_id
WHERE courses.course_description = 'Spanish' AND courses.course_name = 'Spanish' AND subjects.subject_name = 'Language'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.subject_id
FROM Subjects s
JOIN Courses c ON s.subject_id = c.subject_id
WHERE s.subject_name LIKE '%Language%'
AND c.course_name = 'Spanish'
AND c.course_description = 'Spanish'

records.question: Which subjects have courses taught by authors that are exactly female?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT subjects.subject_id FROM subjects
JOIN courses ON subjects.subject_id = courses.subject_id
JOIN course_authors_and_tutors ON courses.author_id = course_authors_and_tutors.author_id
WHERE course_authors_and_tutors.gender_mf = '1'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.subject_id
FROM Subjects s
INNER JOIN Courses c ON s.subject_id = c.subject_id
INNER JOIN Course_Authors_and_Tutors cat ON c.author_id = cat.author_id
WHERE cat.gender_mf = 'F'
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM Courses c2
  WHERE c2.subject_id = s.subject_id
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Course_Authors_and_Tutors cat2
    WHERE c2.author_id = cat2.author_id
    AND cat2.gender_mf != 'F'
  )
)
